behavior_summary: This script implements the conversation/identification behavior for an NPC referred to as 'Devon'. On initialization or when the player enters the NPC's fast-area trigger the script selects a short identifying label (examples in code: "Devon", "fisherman ", "man ") and sends it as a message to the player.

Beyond the initial identification, the module contains a set of helpers that prepare dialog parameters, build a selectable list of player dialog options, present conversation UI, and handle the selected reply with many context-sensitive branches that depend on global game-state flags.

Periodic/per-event helper logic increments a small local counter and occasionally emits brief sympathetic or alarmed lines; other helpers act as guards that gate callbacks into engine subsystems or relay to utility routines.
A single global flag (global [00FC 01]) is explicitly written when the NPC reveals its name; many other global flags are read to choose dialogue variants and to gate availability.
notable_control_flow: Entry: U8P_DEVON::init_0080 runs on actor init and on fast-area entry; it quickly chooses a short identifying string and sends it to the specified pid then suspends/returns.

Guard checks: multiple helpers (e.g., U8P_DEVON::init_0261 and U8P_DEVON::init_00FF) include early-exit logic based on combinations of global flags such as [005B 01], [0063 01], preventing dialog from proceeding in certain game states.

Dialog composition: U8P_DEVON::init_00FF builds numeric dialog parameters (local2/local3/local0) by querying state via 0581:28F9 and then calls the conversation engine 057C:133F to start or step conversation flows.

Main conversation: U8P_DEVON::init_035B assembles a slist (local14) of reply options based on many flags and helper returns, presents them through 057C:* APIs, and branches on the chosen string (local1) to trigger side effects including world/quest calls (e.g., 0402:5079) and setting global [00FC 01].
State mutation: only global [00FC 01] is written (set to 1) when the NPC identifies itself; other globals are treated as read-only selectors that shape behavior.
open_questions: Precise semantics of engine routines (0581:28F9, 057C:091C, 057C:15E7, 057C:133F): their detailed return meanings and how returned bytes map to UI elements are inferred but not certain.
Exact gameplay meaning of many global flags (for example [0058],[005A],[005C],[005D],[003F],[0100],[0036]): they gate conversation trees but their narrative/quest identities are unknown.

The runtime interpretation of some helper-returned numeric modes (local0 values like 0x30/0x28/0x27) — what specific conversation nodes those constants correspond to in the high-level dialogue graph is inferred only.
Whether some external calls (058B:0080, 0402:0261, 0402:5079) perform animation/state changes, quest progress, or both is probable but not conclusively determined from this excerpt.

main_function.name: U8P_DEVON::init_0080
main_function.purpose: On NPC initialization or when the player enters the NPC's fast-area, choose and send a short identifying string to the player and then suspend. This is the lightweight identification/first-contact behavior for the NPC 'Devon'.
entry_conditions: Actor init event (script/process start) or fast-area entry trigger for the NPC
Script runs only when processing is allowed (respects set info/process-exclude state)
Choices are conditioned on global flags such as global [00FC 01] and global [00FD 02]

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::init_0080
function_map.role: Initial identification/fast-area entry handler that selects and emits the NPC's short label to the player.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::init_00FF
function_map.role: Prepare dialog parameters (local0/local2/local3) by querying game state and then call the conversation engine (057C:133F) to start/advance dialog.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::init_0261
function_map.role: Guard/conditional helper that checks global flags and invokes an engine callback when allowed.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::init_028F
function_map.role: Thin relay that calls utility 0581:2A56 and returns; used to reuse external logic.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::init_02AA
function_map.role: Handles a contextual event (param1==3 branch): queries conversation state, presents the line 'What are you doing there...?' and invokes world/quest callbacks.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::init_035B
function_map.role: Main conversation/dialogue handler: builds the options list (local14), presents UI, handles the player's chosen reply and executes side-effects including writing global [00FC 01].

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::init_047A
function_map.role: Per-tick/per-event probe that queries 057C:0BCF to update local8 and occasionally emits brief reassuring/alarm lines.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::calli 08h 0049h
function_map.role: Engine text/display call used to present spoken/message strings to a pid in the context of this NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::0581:28F9
function_map.role: State/query helper used with byte indices to select dialog variants and routes.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::057C:133F
function_map.role: Conversation/dialog engine entry used to start or continue dialog flows with numeric identifiers.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::057C:091C
function_map.role: Engine routine that presents or queries a single dialog/state option and returns a byte used for branching.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::057C:15E7
function_map.role: Engine routine that records/sets dialog/response identifiers or updates UI elements for the NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::0402:0261
function_map.role: World/quest subsystem call used after dialog to advance state or trigger scripted events.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::058B:0080
function_map.role: Small engine control/action call that likely affects NPC state or animation after alarm text.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::0581:2A56
function_map.role: Utility/lookup helper that returns a value used by higher-level dialog logic.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::057C:0BCF
function_map.role: Engine probe/random/state function returning a numeric used to pace periodic messages (local8).

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::calli 06h 00AEh
function_map.role: Callback invoked by guard helper (init_0261) to perform an engine-level callback and return a result.

function_map.name: U8P_DEVON::0402:5079
function_map.role: World/quest call invoked as a side-effect from a conversation branch in init_035B.

internal_calls.purpose: Not direct in canonical flow but related helper: init_00FF prepares dialog params for conversation engine; U8P_DEVON::init_0080 focuses on initial identification and may defer to helpers for richer dialog.
init_035B uses init_00FF to compute dialog indices/numeric codes before calling 057C:133F to present options.
init_0261 can use the relay helper init_028F to access shared utility behavior (0581:2A56) depending on flags.
Periodic helper may indirectly cause dialog/emote behavior handled by main conversation logic when thresholds are reached (inferred pacing interaction).

external_calls.purpose: Send the selected short identifying string (e.g., 'Devon') to the player pid in the context of this NPC.
Query game/world/NPC state with small byte indices to decide which dialog index/mode to use (sets local0/local2/local3).
Invoke the conversation engine with pid, computed dialog index (local3), and numeric code (local2) to start/advance dialog flows.
Invoke an engine callback when guard conditions pass; process returned result and suspend.
Query/present a single dialog/state option and branch before showing the reprimand text 'What are you doing there...?'.
Deliver the line 'What are you doing there...?' to pid when caught/suspicious activity branch is triggered.
Use 057C:091C as a pre-check/presentation primitive in building the dialog flow before showing text or options.
Record or set a dialog/response id in the engine after receiving a retval from checks (used to drive the UI flow).
Trigger world/quest side-effects from certain conversation branches.
Invoke a small engine action likely to change NPC state/animation after alarm text is emitted.
Relay to a utility/lookup routine and return its numeric result to the caller.
Probe engine/random-state to obtain a number used to increment local8 for pacing periodic messages.
Invoke a specific world/quest action as a consequence of a particular dialogue branch.

reads.name: global [00FC 01]
reads.likely_effect: Used to decide whether the NPC has already identified itself and to select greeting/identification path.

reads.name: global [00FD 02]
reads.likely_effect: Selects an alternate short label (e.g., 'fisherman ') used by U8P_DEVON::init_0080 when choosing identification text.

reads.name: global [005B 01]
reads.likely_effect: Availability/location bit used with [0063] to gate dialog and helper invocation.

reads.name: global [0063 01]
reads.likely_effect: Paired with [005B] for early-exit/availability checks; influences whether some helpers run.

reads.name: global [0058 01]
reads.likely_effect: Major branch selector in conversation logic routed through init_035B.

reads.name: global [005A 01]
reads.likely_effect: Selects specific greeting/content variants in helper logic.

reads.name: global [005C 01]
reads.likely_effect: Used with [005D] to choose alternate reply sets and special-casing in dialog building.

reads.name: global [005D 01]
reads.likely_effect: Paired with [005C] to alter dialog option sets.

reads.name: global [003C 01]
reads.likely_effect: Influences periodic counter increment behavior in init_047A (visit/alarm gating).

reads.name: global [0038 01]
reads.likely_effect: Also affects incrementing of local8; related to alarm/visit state.

reads.name: global [003F 01]
reads.likely_effect: Combined with [0100] to select a large alternate dialog path in init_035B.

reads.name: global [0100 01]
reads.likely_effect: Paired with [003F] to gate an alternate conversation branch.

reads.name: global [000B 01]
reads.likely_effect: Used to pick a simple greeting variant in some branches.

reads.name: global [0036 02]
reads.likely_effect: Multi-bit index used to route into a different conversation tree; exact semantics unknown.

reads.name: global [0101 01]
reads.likely_effect: Used occasionally to select a greeting or dialog path.

writes.name: global [00FC 01]
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the NPC reveals its name; marks that the NPC has identified itself so future greetings change accordingly.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the conversation/identification behavior for an NPC referred to as 'Devon'. On initialization or when the player enters the NPC's fast-area trigger the script selects a short identifying label (examples in code: "Devon", "fisherman ", "man ") and sends it as a message to the player.
